title: Valor Mastery
summary: Valor mastery splits between a weapon-heavy vanguard and a relentless duelist. Practice opens the tiers, but your specialization commits you to either battlefield pressure or lethal finishing chains.

thresholds.title: Combat Awakening
thresholds.description: Claim either the vanguard's crushing line or the duelist's finishing rhythm.

thresholds.title: Battle Hardened
thresholds.description: Your chosen style sharpens into a recognisable combat doctrine.

thresholds.title: Veteran Edge
thresholds.description: A deeper commitment turns your branch into a real battlefield identity.

thresholds.title: Champion's Bearing
thresholds.description: Late mastery cements how you control the flow of a fight.

nodes.title: Vanguard Stance
nodes.description: Axes and maces become line-breaking weapons that hit harder and root you in place.

nodes.title: Duelist Footwork
nodes.description: Swords reward constant motion, letting you reposition and keep pressure on a single foe.

nodes.title: Shieldbreaker Drive
nodes.description: Your heavy strikes punish guarded targets, breaking their defense and slowing their response.

nodes.title: Execution Window
nodes.description: Once a foe starts to fold, your duelist route turns that weakness into a kill window.

nodes.title: Warlord Presence
nodes.description: When the fight crowds around you, the vanguard path hardens into a true front-line anchor.

nodes.title: Finishing Chain
nodes.description: Sword kills feed your tempo, turning a clean execution into momentum for the next target.
